name: Check `n Go
description_short: Pasadena, TX payday loans and title loans at Check 'n Go (817 Southmore Ave) provide emergency cash fast.
description_long:
Check 'n Go operates a dedicated payday and title loan storefront at 817 Southmore Ave, Suite 100 G in Pasadena, TX. The location is a standalone storefront on Southmore Ave, making it easy to access from the main street. Hours are Monday through Friday, 10 AM to 6 PM; the store is closed on weekends.

This Pasadena location specializes in payday loans and title loans, offering a way to access emergency cash quickly. You can reach the team at +1 713-534-0004 to discuss your borrowing needs, check eligibility, or apply over the phone.

For Pasadena residents facing unexpected expenses, Check 'n Go offers a straightforward lending option. Bring a valid ID, proof of recent income, and access to an active bank account to speed up your application. Many loans can be processed on the same day.
address: 817 Southmore Ave Suite 100 G, Pasadena, TX 77502

company_info.headquarters: 817 Southmore Ave Suite 100 G, Pasadena, TX 77502

pros: Same-day funding available for in-store applications, next-business-day for online
Exceptional customer reviews (5.0 stars, 1,021 Google reviews) specifically praising staff quality and service speed
Multiple application channels: online, in-store, and phone (where available)
No-cost extended payment plans may be available to reduce repayment burden
Quick application process (described as 'in minutes') with eSignature loan finalization
Accepts Matricula Consular card as alternative ID for underserved populations
Physical location provides in-person consultation and same-day funding certainty
cons: Payday loans carry high APRs typical of the industry; specific rates not disclosed on website
Requires active checking account (30+ days old), limiting access for newly banked or unbanked consumers
Short repayment window creates risk of debt cycle if customer cannot repay by next payday
Company unable to advise on credit impact; hard inquiry may lower credit scores
Website was down for maintenance at time of review, limiting ability to check current rates and terms online
best_for: Salaried or hourly employees facing unexpected expenses who can repay within one payday cycle
Consumers with active checking accounts who need same-day emergency cash locally in Detroit
Borrowers without traditional bank access seeking prepaid card services alongside short-term loans
Workers requiring fast funding with minimal documentation and same-day approval
diagnosis: Check 'n Go is best for salaried or hourly workers in the Detroit area with active checking accounts who face genuine one-time emergencies and can repay within one payday cycle. The main caveat is that payday loans carry high APRs and short repayment windows; borrowers unable to repay on time risk entering a debt cycle. Consider this option only after exhausting lower-cost alternatives like personal loans, employer advances, or credit union PALs.
services: Payday loans (short-term, repaid by next payday)
No-cost extended payment plans (terms vary, contact store)
Netspend Prepaid Mastercard (reloadable, bill payment and shopping)
meta_description: Check 'n Go at 817 Southmore Ave, Pasadena, TX. Fast payday and title loans for emergency cash.
